CustomField.description: Branch of Service required when military service indicated.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(MilitaryStatusClientIntake__c, "Prefer not to say"), ISPICKVAL(MilitaryStatusClientIntake__c, "No military service") ) ), IF( OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(BranchOfService_ClientIntake__c)), NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(BranchOfService_ClientIntake__c, "Army"), ISPICKVAL(BranchOfService_ClientIntake__c, "Navy"), ISPICKVAL(BranchOfService_ClientIntake__c, "Marine Corps"), ISPICKVAL(BranchOfService_ClientIntake__c, "Coast Guard"), ISPICKVAL(BranchOfService_ClientIntake__c, "Space Force"), ISPICKVAL(BranchOfService_ClientIntake__c, "Air Force"), ISPICKVAL(BranchOfService_ClientIntake__c, "Prefer not to say") ) ) ), "Branch of Service required when military service indicated.", "" /* No error if BranchOfService_ClientIntake__c is valid */ ), "" /* No error if MilitaryStatusClientIntake__c does not indicate service */ )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Branch of Service required when military service indicated.
CustomField.label: Errors
